ArgumentTypeCoercion.code: new Expression('(m = n AND c.x) BETWEEN x AND y.z')

InvalidArgument.code: new Predicate\PredicateSet([ new Predicate\Operator('id', '=', 3), new Predicate\Operator('number', '>', 20), ])

MixedReturnTypeCoercion.code: array<string, array{ * sqlObject: AbstractSql, * platform: string, * expected: array{ * sql92: array{ * string: string, * prepare: string, * parameters: array<string, mixed> * }, * MySql: array{ * string: string, * prepare: string, * parameters: array<string, mixed> * }, * Oracle: array{ * string: string, * prepare: string, * parameters: array<string, mixed> * }, * SqlServer: array{ * string: string, * prepare: string, * parameters: array<string, mixed> * }, * } * }>
